creator: mb@imp.ch
text:
Fix a spelling error in /usr/ports/german/staroffice52/Makefile

Fix: 

post-install:--HwhT7mhmWRGPyYoAjYNX473cewLZqdYwm6aXQF8mq6Pf1tqd
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- ports/german/staroffice52/Makefile  Sat Oct 14 22:15:17 2000
+++ ports/german/staroffice52/Makefile  Mon Oct 16 11:45:13 2000
@@ -110,7 +110,7 @@
                ${ECHO} Bitte schicken Sie ein Mail mit dem Fehlerbeschrieb an m
b@imp.ch. Danke ; \
                ${ECHO} ; \
                ${FALSE} ; \
-       endif
+       fi
 .endif
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to install german staroffice port
